---
title: Storage
toc: true
---

This page is under construction.

## Overview

To support diverse data management and computational needs, the ND-HNC -- in partnership with the Center for Research Computing (CRC) -- provides researchers with a shared, multi-tiered data storage infrastructure.

These resources are categorized into three distinct tiers based on the data's activity level and backup requirements:

| Storage Tier | Total Capacity | Mount Location | Primary Purpose | Backup Policy |
|--------------|----------------|----------------|-----------------| --------------|
| 1: Active Storage | 50 TB	| /groups/hnc | Intermediate storage of publication-critical files. | Nightly |
| 2: Cold Storage | 250 TB | /goldfs/hnc | Long-term storage srcdata, rawdata, publication files. | Nightly |
| 3: Scratch | 500 TB | TBD | Temporary workspace for intermediate generation. | **None** |

Key Guidelines for Users:

- Shared Resources: Because these capacities are shared across the ND-HNC community, please manage your allocations responsibly and migrate data to the appropriate tier as your project phases change.
- Data Safety Warning: Tier 3 (Scratch) is intended only for transient data. Do not store critical or irreplaceable files here, as they cannot be recovered in the event of a system failure.

## Access

Any CRC user [account](https://docs.crc.nd.edu/new_user/obtain_account.html) that is part of the HNC group has full access to these resources. Contact [Nathan Muncy](mailto:nmuncy@nd.edu) to be added to the HNC group.

## Dataflow

Using storage tiers for their intended use is critical when multiple users are sharing common resources. Instead of dividing available resources across all ND-HNC affiliated labs, all users currently have full access to all resources. This reflects the fact that projects across labs will be in various stages at any one time.

```{dot}
digraph NDHNC_Data_Flow {
    // General graph settings
    fontname="Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif";
    node [fontname="Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif", shape=box, style="filled", width=2.2];
    edge [fontname="Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif", fontsize=12];
    rankdir=LR; // Left-to-right flow

    // Tier 2: Cold Storage (Blue Theme)
    subgraph cluster_tier2 {
        label = "Tier 2: Cold Storage\l(250 TB, Nightly Backups)\l";
        style = "filled,dashed";
        color = "#dbeafe";
        fillcolor = "#eff6ff";
        fontcolor = "#1e40af";

        tier2_raw [label="Original Data:\l- srcdata DICOM\l- rawdata NIfTI\l- assessment metrics\l- task responses\l", fillcolor="#3b82f6", fontcolor="white"];
        tier2_archive [label="Long-Term Archive:\l- project code\l- final dataframes\l- statistical output\l- figures\l", fillcolor="#1d4ed8", fontcolor="white"];
    }

    // Tier 3: Scratch Workspace (Red/Orange Theme - No Backups)
    subgraph cluster_tier3 {
        label = "Tier 3: Scratch\l(500 TB, NO BACKUPS)\l";
        style = "filled,dashed";
        color = "#fee2e2";
        fillcolor = "#fef2f2";
        fontcolor = "#991b1b";

        tier3_proc [label="Intermediate Files:\l- Preprocessing\l- Subject models\l- Group models\l", fillcolor="#ef4444", fontcolor="white"];
        tier3_trash [label="Purge / Delete\l", shape=box, fillcolor="#b91c1c", fontcolor="white"];
    }

    // Local store
    subgraph cluster_local {
        label = "Local Storage\l";
        style = "filled";
        color = "gray";
        fillcolor = "lightgray";
        fontcolor = "black";

        local_store [label="Complicated Files:\l- Difficult generation\l- Long runtime\l", fillcolor="darkgray", fontcolor="black"];
    }

    // Tier 1: Active Storage (Green Theme)
    subgraph cluster_tier1 {
        label = "Tier 1: Active Storage\l(50 TB, Nightly Backups)\l";
        style = "filled,dashed";
        color = "#dcfce7";
        fillcolor = "#f0fdf4";
        fontcolor = "#166534";

        tier1_active [label="End-of-Pipeline Files\l- Statistical Maps\l- Figures\l", fillcolor="#22c55e", fontcolor="white"];
    }

    // Data Flow Connections (Edges)

    // 1. Initial transfer for processing
    tier2_raw -> tier3_proc [label=" Transfer for\l analysis\l", color="#2563eb", fontcolor="#2563eb", weight=2];

    // 2. Moving important results to Tier 1
    tier3_proc -> tier1_active [label=" Move vital results\l (Pre-publication)\l", color="#16a34a", fontcolor="#16a34a", weight=2];

    // 3. Cleanup of intermediates
    tier3_proc -> tier3_trash [label=" Removed when\l unused\l", color="#dc2626", fontcolor="#dc2626", style="dotted"];
    tier3_proc -> local_store [label=" Manage large\l data footprints\l", color="#dc2626", fontcolor="#dc2626"];

    // 4. Post-publication archiving
    tier1_active -> tier2_archive [label=" Paper accepted:\l Archive Tier 1 data\l", color="black", fontcolor="black"];
}
```

## Details

### Tier 1

### Tier 2

### Tier 3
